assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Step 1 explicitly shows upgrading control plane first with 'gcloud container clusters upgrade' command using --master flag

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides clear upgrade order: coordinating nodes first (least critical), then master nodes (maintain quorum), then data nodes (most critical) - each with detailed rationale

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions in Risk Mitigation section: 'Regional PVs: Your pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in any zone - ✅ Good'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete PDB configuration with minAvailable: 2 for master nodes, explicitly commenting 'Keep quorum (2 of 3)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows exact gcloud commands for all node pools setting --max-surge-upgrade 1 and --max-unavailable-upgrade 0, with comment 'Conservative for Stateful Workloads'

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple instances of checking cluster health with curl commands for GREEN status, including 'Wait for GREEN cluster status before proceeding' after each step

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes 'kubectl get pv -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,RECLAIM:.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy' to verify reclaim policies

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: While the response includes many kubectl commands for monitoring pods and cluster health, it does not include specific 'kubectl rollout status' commands for StatefulSet monitoring

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist step 4 shows: 'curl -X PUT "localhost:9200/_snapshot/backup_repo/pre_upgrade_snapshot?wait_for_completion=true&pretty"' for backing up cluster state and indices
